name: chatgpt-extract
description: Reconstruct an auditable ADOS catalog of your ChatGPT history from export zips, ask it semantically (local, cited), and benchmark the models that classify it.

authority.name: README.md (H1)
authority.note: This file is read by `gpt --version` and asserted against the authority surfaces by tests/test_release_coherence.py (NFR-Q7).

major_features: streaming export extraction (no whole-file JSON load)
local semantic index + cited semantic ask (`gpt ask`)
multi-provider routing (ollama / cursor / codex / claude / openai / anthropic)
model benchmark, metrics, and ADOS Project State reporting
